product_knowledge.tagline: Track and optimize your brand visibility across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and all major AI engines
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is the leading AI search optimization platform that helps brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. It provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve your AI search rankings.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor your brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve your AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track your share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when your brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

instagram_content.preview_text: Missing millions of clicks from customers searching for you?
instagram_content.body:
Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across AI engines is a huge headache for marketers.

Proven results with 63% increase in click-through rates using our AI-powered search optimization platform.

Say goodbye to losing out on sales because one or two keywords are missing. With Searchable, capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-engineered searches.

Unlock the full potential of your brand's online presence. Start tracking your performance with confidence and optimize for actionable insights.

Missing millions of clicks from customers searching for you?

formatted_content.revision_hint_applied: Rewrite the copy to improve the accuracy dimension — ensure every sentence directly supports the primary claim without introducing fabricated statistics or claims not present in the provided proof point.

evaluation.revision_hint: Rewrite the copy to improve the accuracy dimension — ensure every sentence directly supports the primary claim without introducing fabricated statistics or claims not present in the provided proof point.
evaluation.scores_rationale: The first line is an emotional statement ('Missing millions of clicks...'), and the rest of the copy builds upon it. However, some sentences are a bit long and convoluted, making it harder to follow. The hook is not particularly strong or attention-grabbing. It's more of a statement of fact than an emotional appeal. The voice is mostly confident and not pushy, but there are some slight deviations from the writing instruction. The copy accurately conveys the benefits of using Searchable and its proven results.
